name: W-10 /cl-status lists multiple active envelopes when several CLs are running concurrently per the architecture
command: mkdir -p sessions && for i in cl-100 cl-101 cl-102; do printf '%s' "{\"session_id\":\"$i\",\"phases\":[\"$i\"],\"branch\":\"$i\"}" > "sessions/$i.json"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cl-status.sh" --sessions-dir sessions 2>out.txt && grep -q 'session_id=cl-100' out.txt && grep -q 'session_id=cl-101' out.txt && grep -q 'session_id=cl-102' out.txt && echo three 1>&2
